coaching_summary: This routine demonstrates a commendable effort, particularly with the extensive series of back handsprings. However, consistency in execution and control, especially in landings and balance, is a significant area for improvement. The repeated balance checks throughout the back handspring series indicate a need for stronger core engagement and beam awareness. While the amplitude was generally good, the lack of precision in form and control accumulated substantial deductions. Focus on clean, controlled landings and maintaining a tight body position will elevate the overall score.
top_3_fixes: Improve landing control on all skills, especially the dismount, to minimize steps and balance checks.
Strengthen core and beam awareness to reduce balance checks and arm swings during the back handspring series.
Refine body tension and form throughout skills, addressing minor knee bends and leg separations.
